final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input load,
    input clear,
    input [3:0] data_in,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (clear) begin
            q <= 4'b0000;  // Clear the register to 0
        end else if (load) begin
            q <= data_in;  // Load the input value to the register
        end
    end

endmodule
